_note: Strict, recipe-owned spec read by c-eval-runner. A brand may layer brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json to TIGHTEN thresholds (same id wins; new ids appended). See c-eval-runner/SKILL.md for the spec format.

checks.desc: Mechanical gate (loudness ≈ -14 LUFS, frame-0 brightness, resolution 1080×1920, fps, audio present) delegated to c-shorts-qa-gate.
Adapted viral reel: 30–60s nominal; 27–63s after outro ± encode rounding.
Exact 9:16 portrait canvas. A landscape output (e.g. format=16:9 mis-applied) fails here.
(a) HeyGen avatar PIP is clearly visible on every sampled frame — the circle overlay is present, sharp, and not blank or missing.
(b) Chroma-key is clean — no green fringe or halo around the avatar; the colorkey two-pass (0.25:0.05 + 0.40:0.01) has fully removed all green-screen residue.
(c) Source viral video content is visible as the background — the reel faithfully adapts the original format's visual rhythm and pacing, not a blank or solid-color background.
(d) Frame 0 (cover) is the brand card money-shot — not black, not a mid-transition frame, not the raw hook-in opener.
Composite must be full portrait canvas before outro append and final delivery.
